Perfect! I found that Japan expressed intent to meet with Malaysia in 2006 (specifically on July 5, July 20, July 21, and July 27, 2006). And from the earlier search, Japan also expressed intent to meet with Kuwait on November 7, 2006.

So Japan wished to meet with Malaysia in the same year (2006) as it wished to meet with Kuwait.

Let me verify this is the correct answer by checking if there are any other entities that match. Let me also check if there are other years where the same entity wished to meet with both Malaysia and Kuwait.

Actually, wait. The question is: "Who wished to meet with Malaysia in the same year as Kuwait?" This could mean: which entity wished to meet with Malaysia in a year when some entity (possibly the same or different) wished to meet with Kuwait. But it could also mean: which entity wished to meet with Malaysia in a year when that same entity also wished to meet with Kuwait.

Given the examples, it seems like we're looking for an entity that did both in the same year. Japan did both in 2006. Let me check if there are any other entities.
